name: Fullgoal CSI High-end Manufa Index(LOF)
summary: Fullgoal CSI High-end Manufa Index(LOF) is a fund that tracks the performance of the CSI High-end Manufacturing Index. It offers investors exposure to companies in China's high-end manufacturing sector. It is managed by Fullgoal Fund Management Co., Ltd., and is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF).
